title: Synthetic Data Generator — Input
description: Input contract for the synthetic-data-generator skill. Source: /skills/synthetic-data-generator/SKILL.md.

target_schema.description: JSON schema for the records to generate. Mutually exclusive with `target_example` and `template`. If multiple are present, precedence is: template > target_schema > target_example.

target_example.description: Example record from which the skill infers a schema. Used when a formal schema is unavailable.

template.description: Name of a bundled template under /skills/synthetic-data-generator/templates/. Mutually exclusive with target_schema/target_example.

count.description: Number of records to request. Hard cap at 1000; larger batches must be split.

constraints.description: Optional generation constraints applied at planning time.

locale.description: BCP-47 locales to distribute across (e.g., en-US, en-GB).

language.description: Languages to distribute across (overrides locale-derived language).

severity_distribution.description: Map of severity tag → fractional weight (must sum to 1.0).

include_optional_fields_rate.description: Fraction of records that include each optional field.

minimum_distinct_categorical.description: Map of categorical field name → minimum number of distinct values across the batch.

max_share_per_value.description: Cap on the fraction any single categorical value can occupy.

length_buckets.description: Distribution across short/medium/long for free-text fields.

seed.description: Deterministic seed for reproducibility. Same seed + same model + same input ⇒ same output (best-effort).

model.description: Model to use. Defaults to MODEL_WORKER_COMPLEX-equivalent.
